text.title: Monorepo Setup with Turborepo Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there ≥2 deployable surfaces AND is the stack TypeScript-only AND has ops bandwidth?

text.example: Scaffold apps/web + apps/admin + packages/ui + packages/utils → tsconfig.base.json extended by all → turbo.json build with inputs/outputs → @workspace/ui imports → CI with TURBO_TOKEN + matrix → CI time 12→4 minutes.
